evidence.snippet: Battery packs designed and manufactured using high-quality lithium-ion and lithium ferrous phosphate battery cells for the aviation and UAV industry.

items.notes: Custom lithium-ion and LiPo battery packs for UAVs, commercial drones, and eVTOL platforms

value.address: 2 Doxford Drive, South West Industrial Estate, Peterlee, SR8 2RL

evidence.snippet:
### Our Head Office:
Alexander Technologies Europe Limited
2 Doxford Drive,
South West Industrial Estate,
Peterlee, SR8 2RL
United Kingdom

With more than 40 years of experience, Alexander Technologies is a UK battery pack manufacturer supporting OEMs worldwide with custom and [build-to-print battery pack manufacturing](https://www.alexandertechnologies.com/our-manufacturing-capabilities/). We support customers with volume manufacturing and long-term supply, as well as [custom battery design](https://www.alexandertechnologies.com/services/battery-pack-design/) and development.

drone_supply_chain_role.notes: Manufactures custom battery packs sold to drone/UAV OEMs; batteries are explicitly listed as components in the drone supply chain

tagline: Designs and manufactures custom Li-ion and LiFePO₄ battery packs for aviation, UAV, eVTOL, robotics, and e-mobility OEMs. UK-based (Peterlee), production-ready, 40+ years' experience.
